content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape — Nifty -0.37%, Bank Nifty -0.77%, but IT (+0.86%) and Pharma (+0.60%) showing strong sectoral rotation on earnings. VIX +2.59% to 17.05 signals rising caution. Many of our holdings are gapping up on Q4 results (PIDILITIND +8.5%, COFORGE +15.5%, LUPIN +4.1%, BHARATFORG +8.4%, WOCKPHARMA +5.3%, HAL +4.1%, CAMS +5.85%) — strong earnings season tailwind for the book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +10.6%, Q4 PAT +19% YoY beat digested. Stock approaching 52w high 1141.90. Current SL 1066.24 is well above entry (locked +8.4% min) and 22 pts (~2%) below CMP 1088 — proper trail gap. Target 1135 just below 52w high is reasonable. No-op check: SL/target unchanged from stored, so this would be no-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1066.24 already locks +8.4% gain; CMP 1088 gives ~2% trail gap which is the calibrated minimum. Target 1135 sits just below 52w high 1141.90. Let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position -0.6%, today +1.67% bouncing on VIX rise. SL 121 (-3.3%) is appropriate; thesis intact as macro hedge. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5050.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% gain. SL 4725.56 already above entry locking +3.3%, CMP 4793.50 gives 1.4% trail gap (above 1% floor). Raising target from 5000 to 5050 — defense sector momentum strong, 52w high 5165 visible. SL unchanged (already optimally trailed)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2%. Stored SL 6960 sits 1.3% below CMP 7050 (within 1% floor — adequate). Q4 PAT +124% YoY digested, sector momentum strong (SRF +10.4%). Geojit TP 8500. Hold to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% near flat. Stored SL 836 just 0.5% below CMP 840.45 — too tight (below 1% floor). However loosening SL is not allowed; raising would force exit. Holding as-is and accepting that any wobble fires the SL. Order book Rs 13,955 cr supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%. Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY beat digested. Stored SL 365 below CMP 366.35 — within risk budget. Hold to target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%. Q4 revenue +22% YoY, copra tailwind. SL at entry 820 (breakeven trail), CMP 831.55 = 1.4% gap, above floor. Hold to 860."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.8% gain after Q4 PAT +124% / revenue +30% YoY blowout. Stored SL 1329.47 locks +5.6%, CMP 1344.60 gives only 1.1% gap — at the floor, do not tighten further. Raising target from 1395 to 1450 given upper-circuit move + brokerage TPs implying 47-57% upside + USD 1.75bn order book."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%. FY26 PAT +41.8% YoY digested. SL at entry 3025 (breakeven), CMP 3067 = 1.4% gap, above floor. Defense up-cycle + P17B catalyst pending. Hold to 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.2% gain. SL 827.41 locks +2.7%, CMP 839.50 = 1.4% gap, above 1% floor. Q4 record revenue, RTA duopoly. Stored levels already optimal — this would be no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% intraday but Q4 PAT +36.6% YoY just printed today, EBITDA margin +280bps. SL 1445 (-3% from entry). Stock gapped up 8.5% then faded; let it digest. Target 1575 well-set."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3% but Q4 PAT +87.5% YoY blowout printed today, EBITDA margin 33.6%. SL 2400 (-2.8%) absorbs normal post-results chop. Concall today is upside catalyst. Hold to 2590."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%. Q4 PAT swing to profit, biotech +>100% YoY. SL 1545 (-4.5%, wider but justified by mid-cap pharma volatility and Zaynich pipeline asymmetry). Hold to 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY 25 @ 2015 placed 6h ago is now stale — stock gapped up to 2023.50 on Q4 results (PAT -17.4% YoY, mixed print with exceptional charge). Limit price below CMP and chasing is not justified at 52w high after run-up. Cancel and reassess."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "MIS LIMIT BUY placed 54h ago — stale, no longer relevant to current setup. Cancel."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [

  "watchlist_notes": "Strong earnings-season setups not admitted today: SRF (+10.4% chemicals leader, but we already hold NAVINFLUOR + PIDILITIND in chemicals — cluster cap consideration), THERMAX (+10.7% capital goods, but HAL/GRSE/TITAGARH already 3-name capital goods cluster — at cluster cap), FINCABLES/POLYCAB (cables breakout, no holding), BHARATFORG (cancelled stale order, will re-evaluate fresh entry next tick if pulls back to 1980-1990 zone — Q4 mixed but defense diversification + Morgan Stanley Overweight). INDUSINDBK still has SFIO/SEBI overhang (Rule 13 — NO_ACTION). KPIL Q4 results May 14-15 binary event — wait. SOBHA realty volume but down day — no entry. Deployment at 63% with cash 36.8% — within active band; not chasing extended moves into a -0.37% Nifty / VIX +2.6% tape.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book benefiting massively from Q4 earnings season — 7 of 13 holdings printed beats today (PIDILITIND, COFORGE, LUPIN, BHARATFORG-mixed, WOCKPHARMA, HAL, CAMS) plus PNBHOUSING/NAVINFLUOR/GRSE/MARICO/ABCAPITAL prior-week beats. Total unrealized P&L +₹15,153 (+1.5%). 11 of 13 SLs already at or above entry — book is in 'free roll' configuration. Cluster check: Capital Goods (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) ≈ ₹169K = 16.7% of capital — at soft cluster ceiling, declining THERMAX add. Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR+PIDILITIND) ≈ ₹98K = 9.7% — room for SRF if tape supports later. Pharma (LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA) ≈ ₹93K = 9.2%. Financial Services (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) ≈ ₹148K = 14.6%. No sector at cap. Cancelled 2 stale orders to clean up book hygiene per Rule 9."
